title: dryopteris connexa
intro: Dryopteris connexa, also known as the Mountain Wood Fern, is a species of fern native to North America. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris connexa are believed to include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as improving respiratory and digestive health. Dryopteris connexa is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and may also be used in poultices or salves for topical application.
